title: Accident in Kaaimans
description: GEORGE NEWS - George Herald has just...
bodyText:
Breaking News

GEORGE NEWS - George Herald has just received reports of a head-on collision in Kaaimans Pass allegedly involving a car and a truck.

Traffic will be affected.


> More information will follow as it becomes available.


Motorists should take precautions when traveling this route.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
